generated_exposure.exposure_text: I've been thinking about our alliances lately. We all want security, but at what cost? My neighbor's son was drafted last year, and it's heartbreaking to see families stretched thin while others don't pull their weight. We need to make sure our commitments are fair and sustainable. #NationalSecurity #AllianceFairness
